title: Monevium Ltd enters special administration
summary: Monevium Ltd, a UK-based payment services provider, has entered special administration, which may have implications for businesses that interact with or rely on Monevium's services. Compliance officers should be aware of this development and review their organization's relationships with Monevium to ensure regulatory requirements are met.
action_required: Review existing contracts and relationships with Monevium Ltd to assess potential risks and ensure compliance with FCA regulations.

title: FCA consults on proposals to support strong, consistent standards in the SIPP market
summary: The UK Financial Conduct Authority (FCA) has proposed new standards to enhance consistency in the Self-Invested Personal Pensions (SIPP) market, focusing on due diligence, record keeping, and asset protection. These proposals aim to drive greater consistency among SIPP providers while maintaining flexibility and broad investment choices for customers.
action_required: Compliance teams should review the FCA's proposals and assess their firm's current practices to identify areas for improvement and potential adjustments to ensure adherence to the proposed standards.

title: Investors get real-time view of UK bond market activity for the first time
summary: The UK Financial Conduct Authority has introduced a bond consolidated tape, providing investors with real-time access to UK bond market activity, which may require adjustments to existing processes and systems. This update aims to enhance market transparency and may impact how financial institutions operate and report their bond trading activities.
action_required: Financial institutions should review their current systems and processes to ensure they can effectively utilize and integrate the new bond consolidated tape data.

title: Beyond the headlines: the unseen fight against financial crime
summary: The UK Financial Conduct Authority (FCA) has published a speech by Therese Chambers, joint executive director of enforcement and market oversight, discussing the fight against financial crime. The speech highlights the importance of ongoing efforts to combat financial crime, but does not introduce new regulatory requirements or enforcement actions.
action_required: Review the speech to stay informed about the FCA's approach to combating financial crime and consider its implications for the organization's compliance program.

title: Stablecoin remuneration on centralised exchanges
summary: The Bank for International Settlements has issued a regulatory update regarding stablecoin remuneration on centralized exchanges, highlighting the potential risks and implications for financial institutions. This update may require adjustments to existing compliance protocols and risk management strategies to ensure alignment with emerging regulatory expectations.
action_required: Conduct a review of current stablecoin holdings and remuneration practices to assess potential risks and ensure compliance with relevant regulatory guidelines.

title: Cyber insurance unpacked: the corporate digital safety net
summary: The Bank for International Settlements has released a report highlighting the growing threat of cyber risk to economic and financial stability, emphasizing the need for corporations to prioritize digital safety nets. This report serves as a reminder for organizations to assess and strengthen their cyber insurance and risk management strategies to mitigate potential threats.
action_required: Organizations should review and update their cyber risk management frameworks to ensure they are adequately prepared to address the evolving cyber threat landscape.

title: Embracing carbon uncertainty in portfolio construction
summary: The Bank for International Settlements has proposed a framework for constructing fixed-income portfolios that integrates financial and environmental considerations, which may require adjustments to existing risk management and investment strategies. This update is relevant to financial institutions seeking to incorporate environmental factors into their portfolio construction and risk assessment processes.
action_required: Financial institutions should review and assess the proposed framework to determine potential implications for their fixed-income portfolio construction and risk management practices.

title: Bond yield responses to macro news: the role of macro forecast disagreement and monetary policy uncertainty
summary: The Bank for International Settlements has released a research paper analyzing the response of bond yields to macroeconomic news, highlighting the impact of forecast disagreement and monetary policy uncertainty. This study provides valuable insights for financial institutions to better understand and manage their risk exposure to macroeconomic surprises, but does not require immediate action.
action_required: Review the research paper to enhance understanding of bond yield responses to macroeconomic news and consider incorporating its findings into risk management strategies.

title: BIS Quarterly Review, June 2026
summary: The Bank for International Settlements has released a quarterly review highlighting the need for central banks to recalibrate their lending operations to enhance market resilience, which may impact banking operations globally. This update emphasizes the importance of mitigating settlement risks in currency trades, which could lead to moderate adjustments in risk management and operational processes.
action_required: Review and assess current lending operations and risk management processes to identify potential areas for adjustment in line with the BIS recommendations.
